name: phase3-slice2b-100game-rollout-labels

generation.server: node pokemon-showdown start --no-security 8000 (clone @ f8ac140, outside repo)

split_seed42_80_10_10_by_game.leakage: disjoint game sets, cover all 100 games

known_gaps.outcome_metadata_pending: winner/game_outcome/final_turn = __pending__/-1 for all rows (not back-filled; not blocking candidate-rerank since teacher value is the rollout label, not the final game outcome)
known_gaps.dead_feature_columns: slot*_is_damaging, slot*_is_protect, slot*_move_category, slot*_move_type, slot*_actor_species_id, slot*_priority, slot*_switch_target_species_id, slot*_target_species_id_if_known, tera_used, trick_room_active, field_weather, screens_*, mirror_flag, format_id, action_economy_score, fakeout_invalid_penalty, ko_secured_count, protect_prior_target* are constant/unpopulated; derive action class from slot*_move_id until the feature-extractor fix (priority 3)

notes: Raw 14MB JSONL is gitignored; the 660KB .gz is the committed artifact. sha256 is of the uncompressed JSONL. Dataset is deterministically regenerable (stable config_hash).
